title: M005: Update manifests, samples, and migration docs
description:
**Size:** 📦 medium
**Category:** docs
**Priority:** medium
**Source:** Proposed for 'API Promotion v1alpha1 → v1beta1

New package ap'

Generate updated manifests, create v1beta1 samples, and write migration docs:

1. **Run `make manifests`** to regenerate:
   - `config/crd/bases/memcached.c5c3.io_memcacheds.yaml` — Multi-version CRD: v1beta1 with `storage: true`, v1alpha1 with `served: true, storage: false`, conversion webhook strategy configured.
   - `config/webhook/manifests.yaml` — Updated webhook paths pointing to v1beta1 endpoints.
2. **config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_*.yaml** — Create 6 sample manifests (minimal, ha, monitoring, tls, production, full) mirroring the existing v1alpha1 samples but with `apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1`.
3. **Migration documentation** — Write a doc covering: what changed (storage version promotion), backward compatibility (v1alpha1 still served), deprecation timeline for v1alpha1, how conversion works transparently, and any user action required (none for existing clusters — API server converts on read).
4. Verify the conversion webhook configuration in the generated CRD manifest includes the correct `webhookClientConfig` service reference and `conversionReviewVersions`.

**Rationale:** Users need updated samples to adopt v1beta1, and clear migration documentation to understand the deprecation path. The CRD manifest must correctly declare both versions with conversion webhook strategy for the API server to handle multi-version serving.

**Affected Areas:**
- config/crd/bases/memcached.c5c3.io_memcacheds.yaml
- config/webhook/manifests.yaml
- config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_minimal.yaml
- config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_ha.yaml
- config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_monitoring.yaml
- config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_tls.yaml
- config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_production.yaml
- config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_full.yaml
- docs/migration-v1beta1.md

stories.title: Operator developer regenerates manifests for multi-version CRD
stories.want: to run `make manifests` and get a CRD manifest that declares both v1alpha1 and v1beta1 with correct storage/served settings
stories.so_that: the Kubernetes API server can serve both versions and store objects in v1beta1 format
criteria: Running `make manifests` produces config/crd/bases/memcached.c5c3.io_memcacheds.yaml with two versions
v1beta1 has `served: true` and `storage: true`
v1alpha1 has `served: true` and `storage: false`
config/webhook/manifests.yaml is regenerated with v1beta1 webhook paths

stories.title: User deploys Memcached using v1beta1 minimal sample
stories.want: to have v1beta1 sample manifests that I can kubectl apply to create Memcached instances
stories.so_that: I can adopt the new v1beta1 API version with working examples
criteria: 6 sample YAML files exist under config/samples/ with apiVersion memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1
Each sample parses as a valid v1beta1 Memcached CR
Samples cover: minimal, ha, monitoring, tls, production, full configurations
Samples mirror the v1alpha1 equivalents but with v1beta1 apiVersion

stories.title: User references v1beta1 samples from kustomization
stories.want: the v1beta1 samples to be registered in config/samples/kustomization.yaml
stories.so_that: kustomize build includes the new samples alongside existing v1alpha1 samples
criteria: config/samples/kustomization.yaml lists all 6 v1beta1 sample files
Existing v1alpha1 sample entries remain unchanged
kustomize build config/samples succeeds without errors

stories.title: User reads migration documentation to understand v1beta1 promotion
stories.want: clear migration documentation explaining the v1alpha1 to v1beta1 transition
stories.so_that: I understand backward compatibility, deprecation timeline, and what actions (if any) I need to take
criteria: docs/how-to/migration-v1beta1.md exists with sections covering: what changed, backward compatibility, deprecation timeline, how conversion works, user actions required
Document explains that v1alpha1 is still served and no user action is required for existing clusters
Document explains the conversion webhook handles transparent conversion
Document is linked from the docs index page

stories.title: Developer validates v1beta1 samples parse correctly via tests
stories.want: automated tests that validate all v1beta1 sample YAML files parse into valid Memcached structs
stories.so_that: sample correctness is continuously verified and regressions are caught
criteria: api/v1beta1/sample_yaml_test.go exists with tests mirroring api/v1alpha1/sample_yaml_test.go
Tests validate apiVersion, kind, metadata.name for all v1beta1 samples
Tests validate specific features per sample (HA config in ha, monitoring in monitoring, etc.)
All tests pass with `go test ./api/v1beta1/...`

stories.title: Developer verifies CRD manifest has correct conversion webhook configuration
stories.want: the generated CRD manifest to include conversion webhook strategy when patched by kustomize
stories.so_that: the API server can convert between v1alpha1 and v1beta1 transparently
criteria: The CRD kustomization applies the cainjection patch for conversion webhook
The webhook service reference points to the correct service (webhook-service in system namespace)
conversionReviewVersions includes v1
The conversion strategy is documented in migration docs

stories.title: Documentation index references new migration guide
stories.want: the migration guide to be discoverable from the main documentation index
stories.so_that: I can find the migration documentation when browsing the docs
criteria: docs/index.md How-To Guides table includes a row for the migration guide
Link text and description accurately describe the document's purpose
The existing upgrade guide is cross-referenced from the migration doc

requirements.description: Running `make manifests` SHALL regenerate the CRD manifest with v1beta1 as storage version and v1alpha1 as served-only
requirements.rationale: The multi-version CRD manifest is the foundation for API server to serve both versions correctly

scenarios.name: CRD has two versions after regeneration
scenarios.then: config/crd/bases/memcached.c5c3.io_memcacheds.yaml contains both v1alpha1 and v1beta1 version entries
and_then: v1beta1 has storage: true and served: true
v1alpha1 has storage: false and served: true

scenarios.name: Webhook manifests point to v1beta1
scenarios.then: config/webhook/manifests.yaml contains webhook paths for v1beta1 (e.g., /mutate-memcached-c5c3-io-v1beta1-memcached)
and_then: Both mutating and validating webhook configurations are present

scenarios.name: CRD manifest is valid YAML
scenarios.when: the regenerated CRD manifest is parsed
scenarios.then: it is valid YAML and valid CustomResourceDefinition
and_then: No syntax errors or structural issues

requirements.description: Six v1beta1 sample manifests SHALL be created mirroring existing v1alpha1 samples
requirements.rationale: Users need working examples to adopt v1beta1

scenarios.name: Minimal sample exists with v1beta1 apiVersion
scenarios.then: it has apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1 and kind: Memcached with minimal spec (replicas: 1)
and_then: metadata.name is set
standard labels are present

scenarios.name: HA sample exists with v1beta1 apiVersion
scenarios.then: it has apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1 with highAvailability configuration
and_then: antiAffinityPreset, topologySpreadConstraints, PDB, and gracefulShutdown are configured

scenarios.name: Full sample uses all available fields
scenarios.then: it exercises all major spec sections: replicas, image, resources, memcached config, HA, monitoring, security
and_then: Mirrors the v1alpha1 memcached_v1alpha1_memcached.yaml sample content

requirements.description: Each v1beta1 sample SHALL parse as a valid v1beta1 Memcached struct
requirements.rationale: Invalid samples mislead users and break trust in the documentation

scenarios.name: All samples unmarshal without error
scenarios.when: each v1beta1 sample YAML file is unmarshalled into a v1beta1.Memcached struct
scenarios.then: no unmarshal errors occur
and_then: apiVersion matches memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1
kind is Memcached

scenarios.name: Feature-specific fields are present
scenarios.then: spec.highAvailability is non-nil
and_then: monitoring sample has spec.monitoring.enabled=true
tls sample has spec.security.tls.enabled=true

scenarios.name: Production sample has comprehensive configuration
scenarios.then: spec.replicas >= 2 and spec.resources is set
and_then: spec.highAvailability is configured
spec.security is configured

requirements.description: The kustomization.yaml SHALL include all v1beta1 sample files
requirements.rationale: Samples must be discoverable and buildable via kustomize

scenarios.name: All 6 v1beta1 samples are listed
scenarios.then: it contains entries for all 6 v1beta1 sample files
and_then: Existing v1alpha1 entries remain unchanged

scenarios.name: Kustomize build succeeds
scenarios.then: the command exits successfully
and_then: Output includes both v1alpha1 and v1beta1 resources

requirements.description: A migration guide SHALL document the v1alpha1 to v1beta1 transition
requirements.rationale: Users need clear documentation to understand the API promotion and its impact

scenarios.name: Migration doc covers what changed
scenarios.then: it explains that v1beta1 is now the storage version
and_then: v1alpha1 remains served for backward compatibility

scenarios.name: Migration doc covers deprecation timeline
scenarios.then: it states a clear timeline for v1alpha1 deprecation
and_then: Users are advised to migrate manifests to v1beta1

scenarios.name: Migration doc explains conversion mechanism
scenarios.then: it explains that the API server automatically converts between versions via the conversion webhook
and_then: No user action is required for existing clusters
Existing v1alpha1 resources continue to work

requirements.description: The migration guide SHALL explain that no user action is required for existing clusters
requirements.rationale: Users need reassurance that the upgrade is non-disruptive

scenarios.name: No-action-required is clearly stated
scenarios.when: the user action section is read
scenarios.then: it explicitly states that no changes are needed for existing v1alpha1 CRs
and_then: The API server converts stored objects on read transparently

scenarios.name: Recommended migration steps provided
scenarios.when: the migration steps section is read
scenarios.then: it provides optional steps to update manifests from v1alpha1 to v1beta1
and_then: Steps are framed as recommended but not required

requirements.description: The docs index SHALL link to the migration guide
requirements.rationale: Documentation must be discoverable from the main index

scenarios.name: Migration guide appears in How-To table
scenarios.then: the How-To Guides table includes a row linking to how-to/migration-v1beta1.md
and_then: The description accurately summarizes the migration guide

requirements.description: The CRD reference doc SHALL be updated to reflect v1beta1 as the primary API version
requirements.rationale: The CRD reference must reflect the current primary API version

scenarios.name: CRD reference shows v1beta1 as primary
scenarios.when: docs/reference/crd-reference.md Resource Info table is read
scenarios.then: API Version shows v1beta1 (or both v1alpha1 and v1beta1)
and_then: Examples in the doc use v1beta1 apiVersion

scenarios.name: Inline examples use v1beta1
scenarios.when: YAML examples in crd-reference.md are inspected
scenarios.then: all example CRs use apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1
and_then: v1alpha1 examples are either removed or marked as deprecated

requirements.description: The docs/how-to/examples.md SHALL include v1beta1 examples
requirements.rationale: The examples how-to guide should reference the current primary API version

scenarios.name: Examples page references v1beta1
scenarios.then: example CRs use apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1
and_then: References to v1alpha1 examples note that v1beta1 is preferred

requirements.description: The upgrade guide SHALL mention v1beta1 promotion in the compatibility matrix
requirements.rationale: The version compatibility matrix should reflect the new API version

scenarios.name: Compatibility matrix updated
scenarios.then: it includes a row for the version that introduces v1beta1
and_then: CRD API Version column shows v1alpha1 + v1beta1

tasks.title: Run `make manifests` to regenerate CRD and webhook manifests (REQ-001)
tasks.description: Run `make manifests` to regenerate config/crd/bases/memcached.c5c3.io_memcacheds.yaml and config/webhook/manifests.yaml. Verify CRD has v1beta1 with storage: true and v1alpha1 with storage: false. Verify webhook manifests point to v1beta1 paths. The CRD is generated from kubebuilder markers on api/v1beta1/memcached_types.go (+kubebuilder:storageversion) and api/v1alpha1/memcached_types.go.

tasks.title: Create v1beta1 minimal sample manifest (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Create config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_minimal.yaml mirroring memcached_v1alpha1_minimal.yaml but with apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1. Content: 1 replica, standard labels, name memcached-dev.

tasks.title: Create v1beta1 ha sample manifest (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Create config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_ha.yaml mirroring memcached_v1alpha1_ha.yaml but with apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1. Content: 3 replicas, resources, memcached config, highAvailability with antiAffinity, topologySpread, PDB, gracefulShutdown.

tasks.title: Create v1beta1 monitoring sample manifest (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Create config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_monitoring.yaml mirroring memcached_v1alpha1_monitoring.yaml but with apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1. Content: 2 replicas, monitoring enabled with exporter resources and serviceMonitor config.

tasks.title: Create v1beta1 tls sample manifest (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Create config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_tls.yaml mirroring memcached_v1alpha1_tls.yaml but with apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1. Content: 3 replicas, security.tls.enabled=true with certificateSecretRef.

tasks.title: Create v1beta1 production sample manifest (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Create config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_production.yaml mirroring memcached_v1alpha1_production.yaml but with apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1. Content: 5 replicas, comprehensive config with HA, monitoring, security (SASL, TLS, NetworkPolicy), production resources.

tasks.title: Create v1beta1 full sample manifest (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Create config/samples/memcached_v1beta1_full.yaml mirroring memcached_v1alpha1_memcached.yaml (the main sample) but with apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1. Content: 3 replicas, image, resources, memcached config, HA with PDB, monitoring, security contexts.

tasks.title: Update config/samples/kustomization.yaml to include v1beta1 samples (REQ-004)
tasks.description: Add all 6 v1beta1 sample files to config/samples/kustomization.yaml resources list. Keep existing v1alpha1 entries. Files to add: memcached_v1beta1_minimal.yaml, memcached_v1beta1_ha.yaml, memcached_v1beta1_monitoring.yaml, memcached_v1beta1_tls.yaml, memcached_v1beta1_production.yaml, memcached_v1beta1_full.yaml.

tasks.title: Create v1beta1 sample YAML tests in api/v1beta1/sample_yaml_test.go (REQ-003)
tasks.description: Create api/v1beta1/sample_yaml_test.go following the pattern in api/v1alpha1/sample_yaml_test.go. Include: TestSampleYAMLFiles (discover and validate all v1beta1 samples), TestSampleYAMLMinimal, TestSampleYAMLFull, TestSampleYAMLHA, TestSampleYAMLMonitoring, TestSampleYAMLTLS, TestSampleYAMLProduction, TestAllSamplesHaveValidStructure. Each test validates apiVersion=memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1, kind=Memcached, non-empty name, and feature-specific fields.

tasks.title: Write migration documentation docs/how-to/migration-v1beta1.md (REQ-005, REQ-006)
tasks.description: Create docs/how-to/migration-v1beta1.md covering: (1) Overview - v1beta1 is now the storage version, (2) What Changed - storage version promotion, schema identical, (3) Backward Compatibility - v1alpha1 still served, existing CRs work without changes, (4) How Conversion Works - API server uses conversion webhook transparently, (5) Deprecation Timeline - v1alpha1 deprecated, planned removal in future release, (6) User Actions Required - none for existing clusters, recommended to update manifests, (7) Migrating Your Manifests - sed command to update apiVersion, (8) FAQ. Cross-reference docs/how-to/upgrade.md.

tasks.title: Update docs/index.md to link migration guide (REQ-007)
tasks.description: Add a row to the How-To Guides table in docs/index.md linking to how-to/migration-v1beta1.md with description 'Migrate from v1alpha1 to v1beta1 API version'.

tasks.title: Update docs/reference/crd-reference.md to reflect v1beta1 as primary (REQ-008)
tasks.description: Update docs/reference/crd-reference.md: (1) Change API Version in Resource Info table from v1alpha1 to v1beta1, (2) Update all inline YAML examples to use apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1, (3) Add a note that v1alpha1 is still supported but deprecated. Update the minimal, full, HA, and autoscaling examples.

tasks.title: Update docs/how-to/upgrade.md compatibility matrix (REQ-010)
tasks.description: Add a new row to the Version Compatibility Matrix in docs/how-to/upgrade.md for the version introducing v1beta1. Update CRD API Version column to show 'v1alpha1 + v1beta1'. Also update the CRD compatibility notes section to mention multi-version serving and the conversion webhook.

tasks.title: Update docs/how-to/examples.md to use v1beta1 (REQ-009)
tasks.description: Update docs/how-to/examples.md to use apiVersion: memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1 in all inline YAML examples. Add a note that v1alpha1 examples still work but v1beta1 is preferred.

review_criteria: `make manifests` produces the expected CRD with v1beta1 as storage version and v1alpha1 as served-only
All 6 v1beta1 sample YAML files exist, parse correctly, and mirror their v1alpha1 counterparts
config/samples/kustomization.yaml includes all v1beta1 sample files
docs/how-to/migration-v1beta1.md covers all required sections: what changed, backward compatibility, deprecation, conversion, user actions
docs/index.md links to the migration guide in the How-To table
docs/reference/crd-reference.md uses v1beta1 as the primary API version in examples
docs/how-to/upgrade.md compatibility matrix includes v1beta1 entry
No v1alpha1 sample files are modified or broken
All existing tests continue to pass: `go test ./...`
implementation_notes: This feature is documentation and manifest-focused with no Go code changes (except new test file). Key patterns: (1) Sample YAML files follow the naming convention memcached_{version}_{variant}.yaml with standard labels app.kubernetes.io/name and app.kubernetes.io/managed-by. (2) Sample YAML tests follow the pattern in api/v1alpha1/sample_yaml_test.go using sigs.k8s.io/yaml unmarshal and runtime.Caller for path resolution. (3) The CRD is generated by controller-gen from kubebuilder markers - v1beta1 has +kubebuilder:storageversion marker. (4) The kustomize overlay in config/default/ patches webhook CA injection but does NOT add a conversion webhook strategy to the CRD - conversion is handled via the Hub/Spoke pattern in controller-runtime where v1beta1 implements Hub() and v1alpha1 implements ConvertTo/ConvertFrom. (5) Docs use VitePress markdown format. Migration doc should follow the style of existing how-to guides (upgrade.md). (6) The 'full' sample corresponds to memcached_v1alpha1_memcached.yaml (the original main sample). Note: The feature description says 'docs/migration-v1beta1.md' but the docs structure uses how-to/ subdirectory, so the file should be docs/how-to/migration-v1beta1.md for consistency.
